006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.microservice.management;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.*;
023
024/**
025 * Convenience assembly of the Actuator-style management surface under a single configurable path prefix.
026 *
027 * <p>
028 * Mounts the management endpoints by composing their {@code *Mixin} flavors via
029 * {@link Rest#mixins() @Rest(mixins=...)} on top of {@link BasicRestServletGroup}:
030 * <ul>
031 *    <li>{@code /info} &mdash; {@link InfoMixin} (manifest/build/version/git metadata)
032 *    <li>{@code /loggers}, {@code /loggers/{name}} &mdash; {@link LoggersMixin} (runtime JUL level get/set)
033 *    <li>{@code /healthz}, {@code /readyz}, {@code /livez} &mdash; {@link HealthMixin} (read-through health view)
034 *    <li>{@code /threaddump}, {@code /heapdump} &mdash; {@link DumpsMixin} (deny-by-default diagnostics)
035 * </ul>
036 *
037 * <p>
038 * <b>Path prefix:</b> defaults to {@code /actuator} and is configurable via the {@code juneau.actuator.path}
039 * system property (resolved through the standard {@code $S{...}} SVL var).  Mount the group at a custom prefix
040 * either by setting that property or by subclassing with your own {@link Rest#path() @Rest(path=...)}.
041 *
042 * <p>
043 * <b>Composition is convenience, not the only way in:</b> every endpoint remains independently mountable
044 * a-la-carte via its standalone {@code *Mixin}/{@code *Resource} flavor.  The {@code /metrics} endpoint is
045 * <b>not</b> assembled here &mdash; it lives in the {@code juneau-rest-server-metrics-micrometer} module
046 * (which this module does not depend on), so add {@code MetricsMixin} a-la-carte when that module is present.
047 *
048 * <p>
049 * <b>Exposure policy:</b> the read endpoints ({@code /info}, {@code /loggers} read, health) are on; the
050 * mutating/sensitive ones ({@code /loggers} write, {@code /threaddump}, {@code /heapdump}) are deny-by-default
051 * &mdash; the dumps via {@link DumpsSettings}, and logger-writes should be guarded by the consumer.  No auth
052 * provider is auto-wired (explicit-over-magic).
053 *
054 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
055 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/ManagementSurface">Management Surface</a>
056 * </ul>
057 *
058 * @serial exclude
059 * @since 10.0.0
060 */
061@Rest(
062   path="$S{juneau.actuator.path,/actuator}",
063   title="Management",
064   description="Actuator-style management surface.",
065   mixins={
066      InfoMixin.class,
067      LoggersMixin.class,
068      HealthMixin.class,
069      DumpsMixin.class
070   }
071)
072@SuppressWarnings({
073   "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for microservice hierarchy.
074})
075public class BasicActuatorGroup extends BasicRestServletGroup {
076   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
077}
